commands.review_summary:
The PR adds sanitized subagent start/completion item events and maps `subagent` progress items to the existing `sessions_spawn` draft-line display.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature PR rather than a bug report. The affected source path is clear from the proposed item-event emissions and current Telegram progress-draft consumption.

target.title: [codex] Surface subagent progress drafts
target.body:
## Summary

- surfaces accepted `sessions_spawn` work as keyed transient sub-agent progress items
- converts subagent completion internal events into transient progress updates
- redacts and caps subagent labels/status summaries before they can reach channel progress drafts
- maps `subagent` progress items to the existing `sessions_spawn` display entry so Telegram native draft previews can render them

## Local system integration

- Built runtime dist from this branch and copied it into `/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/openclaw/dist` after backup.
- Backup: `/Users/alexanderkrimm/.openclaw/backups/openclaw-dist-subagent-drafts-20260519-000418`
- Restarted local OpenClaw LaunchAgent gateway.
- Verified installed SDK import renders `🧑‍🔧 Sub-agent: Worker A: completed` with id `subagent:local`.
- Verified gateway health after restart: `Read probe: ok`, admin-capable, pid `52561`.
- Verified gateway agent turn returned `SUBAGENT_DRAFT_GATEWAY_PATCH_OK` with `status=ok`.

## Validation

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/pi-embedded-subscribe.handlers.tools.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-pi-session.subscribeembeddedpisession.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/channel-streaming.test.ts`
- Result: 5 test files / 175 tests passed
- `git diff --check`
- `node scripts/tsdown-build.mjs && node scripts/runtime-postbuild.mjs && node scripts/build-stamp.mjs && node scripts/runtime-postbuild-stamp.mjs`
- `openclaw config validate`
- `openclaw plugins doctor`

## Notes

- This follows up the merged Telegram native draft lane from #83622.
- No final answer text is moved into native drafts; this only adds subagent start/completion progress lines for the existing transient progress pipeline.
